title: Write ferrum_extlib_widget.md
description: CCSP lib_ccsp_widget: Flutter layout model (constraints down, sizes up, parent sets position) in Ferrum. Not in Ferrum stdlib. Design extlib module: layout widgets (flex, stack, constrained, padded, expanded, aligned, scrollable, sized_box, aspect_ratio, wrap), leaf widgets (text, image, colored_box, custom_paint), gesture detectors (tap, drag, hover, scale), dirty region tracking, O(n) single-pass layout guarantee.
